state.history_summary:
assistant: Hi! How can I help you today?

candidate_answers.text: You’re welcome. Your cancellation and refund are already confirmed, so no further action is needed.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Use the later closing user turn because it is an exact source user message after the cancellation and refund have already been completed, so stop is the only grounded next action.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the decision-point state. Scores reflect which action most directly advances the user's request using only visible conversation evidence.
notes: query comes directly from the selected user message including the stop marker
history_summary stops at the completed refund confirmation and excludes any imagined follow-up
candidate_answers are manual non-leaky drafts grounded only in visible context
special case: terminal thank-you turn after successful cancellation
